mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN dimension_group = '品质考核' THEN dimension_score END), 0) as dimA, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN dimension_group = '成本考核' THEN dimension_score END), 0) as dimB, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN dimension_group = '交货考核' THEN dimension_score END), 0) as dimC, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN dimension_group = '服务考核' THEN dimension_score END), 0) as dimD FROM sp_department_score WHERE supplier_name = #{supplierName} AND year_month = #{yearMonth} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT s.name FROM sp_supplier_pool s WHERE s.category = #{category} AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.is_disabled = 0 ORDER BY s.name

SELECT s.name, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN ds.dimension_group = '品质考核' THEN ds.dimension_score END), 0) as dimA, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN ds.dimension_group = '成本考核' THEN ds.dimension_score END), 0) as dimB, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN ds.dimension_group = '交货考核' THEN ds.dimension_score END), 0) as dimC, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN ds.dimension_group = '服务考核' THEN ds.dimension_score END), 0) as dimD FROM sp_supplier_pool s LEFT JOIN sp_department_score ds ON s.name = ds.supplier_name AND ds.year_month = #{yearMonth} WHERE s.category = #{category} AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.is_disabled = 0 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY s.name
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY category
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_disabled = 0 ORDER BY name
